channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Monday, March 30
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 01:54 AM (1.568 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 09:04 AM (-0.032 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SE 13 G 22 mph
